title: KnowledgeRecord
description: Payload for message_type=KnowledgeRecord. Sent by Knowledge → Overseer. Triggered automatically on verification_status=fail/blocked_requirements/deferred. Overseer MUST NACK if prevention_patches or regression_checks are empty — this enforces 'heal the failure point' behavior.

knowledge_status.description: 'pass' = record is complete and Overseer can advance. 'needs_info' = Knowledge needs more data before it can produce patches. 'fail' = Knowledge is blocked.

classification.description: Primary failure category. Used to route the record to the correct prevention library.

what_broke.description: Concise description of the observable failure. Must be specific enough to reproduce.

root_cause.description: The underlying cause of the failure. Must be one level deeper than 'what_broke'.

evidence.description: Log excerpts, file:line references, or other artifacts proving root_cause. Must not be empty.

prevention_patches.description: Concrete changes to prevent recurrence. Overseer MUST NACK if empty. At least one entry required.

target.description: What is being patched: a role prompt, a file path, a policy rule, or a template.

change.description: The specific change to apply. Must be actionable (not 'improve error handling').

regression_checks.description: Concrete tests that would catch a recurrence of this failure. Overseer MUST NACK if empty. At least one entry required.

anti_repeat_key.description: Optional stable identifier for this failure pattern. Knowledge uses this to detect duplicate root causes across runs.
